generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values order and duty, you know how important it is to be prepared. Did you know that excessive civil defense spending actually weakens our national security? Experts agree that balanced preparedness, not excessive spending, is what truly keeps us safe. Let's focus on smart, effective measures that protect our communities without breaking the bank. #NationalSecurity #SmartPreparedness
